claims.summary: The 45-second hold and release path may contain discontinuities.
claims.disposition: Verified hold, release, and nonzero-span clamping are continuous and covered at boundaries and midpoint.

claims.summary: The surge taper around 0.75 should have a smooth midpoint rather than a hard switch.
claims.disposition: Verified the 0.70-to-0.80 surge path uses smoothstep with an exact midpoint test at 0.75.

claims.summary: Context multipliers should be traced together to reveal hidden amplification.
claims.disposition: Routed to a read-only fixture trace of existing multiplier composition and persistence caps.

claims.summary: Hold, release, surge, or persistence tuning could change the felt cadence.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because these parameters alter live sensory cadence, admission, and regulation.
